prompt: Ultra-realistic overhead flat-lay food photography of freshly baked butter croissants arranged artfully on aged parchment paper on a cream-colored linen cloth. The croissants have a perfect deep golden-brown lacquered crust with visible lamination layers peeling slightly at the tips, flaky and shatteringly crisp. Small pastry flakes scattered naturally around them. A small ceramic ramekin of European cultured butter sits beside them, knife resting casually. Soft natural diffuse daylight from a window, very slightly warm. 50mm lens, f/4.0, ISO 100. No artificial light, no harsh shadows. Elegant but completely natural composition. The textures of linen, parchment, and pastry are all clearly distinct and tactile. Documentary food editorial style.
negative_prompt: plastic, CGI, cartoon, artificial light, studio setup, overexposed, flat lay with too many props, synthetic butter, dry dull crust, generic stock photo, blurry, low quality, watermark

settings.style: editorial food photography, flat-lay, natural light
settings.lighting: soft diffuse daylight, slightly warm, gentle shadows
settings.quality: ultra high detail, visible lamination flakes, linen texture
